content.json:
## SmartScreen Web Threats

Hunt risky web activity (Malicious, Phishing, TechScam, custom blocks, and non-business categories like Adult/Gambling/Dating/Gaming/Streaming) from Microsoft Defender SmartScreen + Web Content Filtering.

Scope with **Time Range / User / Device / URL contains**, then triage on *Top Users / Domains* and pivot to *Risky User Correlation*.

parameters.name: UserUPN
parameters.label: User UPN (use * for all, supports partial match)

parameters.name: DeviceName
parameters.label: Device (use * for all, supports partial match)

parameters.name: UrlContains
parameters.label: URL contains (press Enter to apply, e.g. bet365)

content.json: Top 25 users, devices, domains, and SmartScreen/Web-Content categories across the selected scope. Click a row to view the **same scope** filtered in the category tabs.

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category    = tostring(P.Experience),
         WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend Bucket = case(
     ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited"), strcat("WebContent: ", iff(isempty(WebCategory),"(uncategorized)",WebCategory)),
     isnotempty(Category), Category,
     ActionType)
| summarize Events = count() by Bucket
| top 20 by Events desc
| render barchart
content.title: Events by Category

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend Domain = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| where isnotempty(Domain)
| summarize Hits = count(), Users = dcount(InitiatingProcessAccountUpn), Devices = dcount(DeviceName) by Domain
| top 25 by Hits desc
content.title: Top 25 Domains

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience), WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| summarize Hits = count(),
            Devices = dcount(DeviceName),
            Domains = dcount(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host)),
            MaliciousHits = countif(Category in ("Malicious","Phishing","TechScam")),
            RiskyHits     = countif(WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming")),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
         by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| where isnotempty(User)
| top 25 by Hits desc
content.title: Top 25 Users (with Malicious & Risky counts)

content.json: Users who triggered **both** risky non-business category events (Adult, Gambling, Dating, Gaming, Streaming) **and** SmartScreen Malicious / Phishing / TechScam events in the selected window. These are prime candidates for SOC follow-up: a browsing path that started in a low-reputation category and ended in confirmed malicious destinations.

content.query:
let base =
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience), WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend IsRisky     = WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming"),
         IsMalicious = Category in ("Malicious","Phishing","TechScam");
base
| summarize
    RiskyHits      = countif(IsRisky),
    MaliciousHits  = countif(IsMalicious),
    FirstRisky     = minif(TimeGenerated, IsRisky),
    LastRisky      = maxif(TimeGenerated, IsRisky),
    FirstMalicious = minif(TimeGenerated, IsMalicious),
    LastMalicious  = maxif(TimeGenerated, IsMalicious),
    Devices        = make_set(DeviceName, 10),
    SampleRiskyUrls     = make_set_if(RemoteUrl, IsRisky, 5),
    SampleMaliciousUrls = make_set_if(RemoteUrl, IsMalicious, 5)
  by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| where isnotempty(User) and RiskyHits > 0 and MaliciousHits > 0
| extend MinutesRiskyToMalicious = iff(isnotempty(FirstMalicious) and isnotempty(FirstRisky), datetime_diff('minute', FirstMalicious, FirstRisky), int(null))
| order by MaliciousHits desc, RiskyHits desc
content.title: Users with Risky+Malicious activity

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience), WebCategory = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend Severity = case(
     Category in ("Malicious","Phishing","TechScam"), "High",
     WebCategory has_any ("Adult","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming"), "Medium",
     Category in ("Untrusted","CustomBlockList","CustomPolicy"), "Low",
     "Info")
| project TimeGenerated, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, DeviceName, Severity, Category, WebCategory, ActionType, RemoteUrl, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Full event timeline (filtered)

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(ParsedFields.Experience)
| where isnotempty(Category)
| summarize count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenAppWarning","SmartScreenUrlWarning")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(ParsedFields.Experience)
| where isnotempty(Category)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, FileName, BlockedUrl = RemoteUrl, Category, ActionType, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.json: All three Web Content Filter outcomes on one tab: **Blocked** + **Audited** from `DeviceEvents.ExploitGuardNetworkProtection*`, plus **Allowed** traffic from `DeviceNetworkEvents` (the only source for Allow-mode WCF in advanced hunting).

parameters.name: WebCategoryFilter
parameters.label: Web category
parameters.query:
let classify = (h:string){case(h has_any ("xvideos","xnxx","pornhub","redtube","xhamster","chaturbate","livejasmin","onlyfans","brazzers","youporn","spankbang","stripchat","cam4","myfreecams","tnaflix","camsoda","xvideos-cdn","xnxx-cdn"),"Adult content",h has_any ("bet365","betway","draftkings","fanduel","pokerstars","ladbrokes","888casino","bovada","unibet","bwin","betmgm","stake.com","casino","sportsbet"),"Gambling",h has_any ("tinder","bumble","match.com","okcupid","hinge","plentyoffish","ashleymadison","grindr","badoo","eharmony","zoosk"),"Dating",h has_any ("steamcommunity","steampowered","epicgames","battle.net","ubisoft","roblox","minecraft","twitch","gamespot","kotaku"),"Gaming",h has_any ("netflix","hulu","disneyplus","primevideo","spotify","pandora","soundcloud","tiktok","crunchyroll","hbomax","peacocktv","paramountplus"),"Streaming media","")};
let net = DeviceNetworkEvents
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| where isnotempty(Host)
| extend WebCategory = classify(Host)
| where isnotempty(WebCategory)
| distinct WebCategory;
let de = DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| extend WebCategory = tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).ResponseCategory)
| where isnotempty(WebCategory)
| distinct WebCategory;
union (print WebCategory="All"), net, de
| distinct WebCategory
| order by iff(WebCategory=="All",0,1) asc, WebCategory asc

content.query:
let pf = "{PolicyFilter}";
let wcat = "{WebCategoryFilter}";
let classify = (h:string){case(h has_any ("xvideos","xnxx","pornhub","redtube","xhamster","chaturbate","livejasmin","onlyfans","brazzers","youporn","spankbang","stripchat","cam4","myfreecams","tnaflix","camsoda","xvideos-cdn","xnxx-cdn"),"Adult content",h has_any ("bet365","betway","draftkings","fanduel","pokerstars","ladbrokes","888casino","bovada","unibet","bwin","betmgm","stake.com","casino","sportsbet"),"Gambling",h has_any ("tinder","bumble","match.com","okcupid","hinge","plentyoffish","ashleymadison","grindr","badoo","eharmony","zoosk"),"Dating",h has_any ("steamcommunity","steampowered","epicgames","battle.net","ubisoft","roblox","minecraft","twitch","gamespot","kotaku"),"Gaming",h has_any ("netflix","hulu","disneyplus","primevideo","spotify","pandora","soundcloud","tiktok","crunchyroll","hbomax","peacocktv","paramountplus"),"Streaming media","")};
let netAllowed = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| where isnotempty(Host)
| extend WebCategory = classify(Host), PolicyAction = "Allowed"
| where isnotempty(WebCategory);
let dePolicy = DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| extend ResponseCat = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend WebCategory = iff(isempty(ResponseCat), classify(Host), ResponseCat)
| extend PolicyAction = iff(ActionType == "ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","Blocked","Audited")
| where isnotempty(WebCategory);
union netAllowed, dePolicy
| where pf == "All" or PolicyAction == pf
| where wcat == "All" or WebCategory == wcat
| summarize Hits = count() by WebCategory, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
content.title: Web Content Filter — events by Category (filtered by Policy outcome)

content.query:
let pf = "{PolicyFilter}";
let wcat = "{WebCategoryFilter}";
let classify = (h:string){case(h has_any ("xvideos","xnxx","pornhub","redtube","xhamster","chaturbate","livejasmin","onlyfans","brazzers","youporn","spankbang","stripchat","cam4","myfreecams","tnaflix","camsoda","xvideos-cdn","xnxx-cdn"),"Adult content",h has_any ("bet365","betway","draftkings","fanduel","pokerstars","ladbrokes","888casino","bovada","unibet","bwin","betmgm","stake.com","casino","sportsbet"),"Gambling",h has_any ("tinder","bumble","match.com","okcupid","hinge","plentyoffish","ashleymadison","grindr","badoo","eharmony","zoosk"),"Dating",h has_any ("steamcommunity","steampowered","epicgames","battle.net","ubisoft","roblox","minecraft","twitch","gamespot","kotaku"),"Gaming",h has_any ("netflix","hulu","disneyplus","primevideo","spotify","pandora","soundcloud","tiktok","crunchyroll","hbomax","peacocktv","paramountplus"),"Streaming media","")};
let netAllowed = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| where isnotempty(Host)
| extend WebCategory = classify(Host), PolicyAction = "Allowed"
| where isnotempty(WebCategory);
let dePolicy = DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| extend ResponseCat = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend WebCategory = iff(isempty(ResponseCat), classify(Host), ResponseCat)
| extend PolicyAction = iff(ActionType == "ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","Blocked","Audited")
| where isnotempty(WebCategory);
union netAllowed, dePolicy
| where pf == "All" or PolicyAction == pf
| where wcat == "All" or WebCategory == wcat
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, WebCategory, PolicyAction, Host, RemoteUrl, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Web Content Filter — events

content.query:
let pf = "{PolicyFilter}";
let wcat = "{WebCategoryFilter}";
let classify = (h:string){case(h has_any ("xvideos","xnxx","pornhub","redtube","xhamster","chaturbate","livejasmin","onlyfans","brazzers","youporn","spankbang","stripchat","cam4","myfreecams","tnaflix","camsoda","xvideos-cdn","xnxx-cdn"),"Adult content",h has_any ("bet365","betway","draftkings","fanduel","pokerstars","ladbrokes","888casino","bovada","unibet","bwin","betmgm","stake.com","casino","sportsbet"),"Gambling",h has_any ("tinder","bumble","match.com","okcupid","hinge","plentyoffish","ashleymadison","grindr","badoo","eharmony","zoosk"),"Dating",h has_any ("steamcommunity","steampowered","epicgames","battle.net","ubisoft","roblox","minecraft","twitch","gamespot","kotaku"),"Gaming",h has_any ("netflix","hulu","disneyplus","primevideo","spotify","pandora","soundcloud","tiktok","crunchyroll","hbomax","peacocktv","paramountplus"),"Streaming media","")};
let netAllowed = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| where isnotempty(Host)
| extend WebCategory = classify(Host), PolicyAction = "Allowed"
| where isnotempty(WebCategory);
let dePolicy = DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionAudited")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Host = tolower(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host))
| extend ResponseCat = tostring(P.ResponseCategory)
| extend WebCategory = iff(isempty(ResponseCat), classify(Host), ResponseCat)
| extend PolicyAction = iff(ActionType == "ExploitGuardNetworkProtectionBlocked","Blocked","Audited")
| where isnotempty(WebCategory);
union netAllowed, dePolicy
| where pf == "All" or PolicyAction == pf
| where wcat == "All" or WebCategory == wcat
| where (wcat == "All" and WebCategory in ("Adult content","Gambling","Dating","Gaming","Streaming media")) or WebCategory == wcat
| summarize Hits = count(), Devices = dcount(DeviceName), Allowed = countif(PolicyAction=="Allowed"), Audited = countif(PolicyAction=="Audited"), Blocked = countif(PolicyAction=="Blocked"), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), SampleUrls = make_set(RemoteUrl, 5) by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, WebCategory, Host
| where isnotempty(User)
| order by Hits desc
content.title: Risky Category (Adult / Gambling / Dating / Gaming / Streaming) — by User & Host

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType == "SmartScreenAppWarning"
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(ParsedFields.Experience)
| where isnotempty(Category)
| summarize count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

DeviceEvents
| where ActionType == "SmartScreenAppWarning"
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(ParsedFields.Experience)
| where isnotempty(Category)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, FileName, Category, ActionType, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

content.json: Pick a SmartScreen `Experience` above to scope the chart and grid below. Covers TechScam, Phishing, Untrusted, Malicious, Custom Block List (your MDE indicators), and Custom Policy (your Web Content Filter rules).

content.query:
let exp = '{Experience}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType == "SmartScreenUrlWarning"
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience)
| where Category =~ exp
| summarize Events = count() by Category, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
content.title: Events over time

content.query:
let exp = '{Experience}';
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType == "SmartScreenUrlWarning"
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(P.Experience)
| where Category =~ exp
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, BlockedUrl = RemoteUrl, Category, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Events

content.json: Events where a user **clicked through** a SmartScreen warning (`SmartScreenUserOverride`) or **bypassed** a Network Protection block (`NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent`). These users acknowledged the risk and proceeded anyway — they are the highest-priority follow-ups in any web-threat hunt. The grid below also tags the browser that initiated the override so you can spot 3rd-party-browser bypass patterns.

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| summarize Events = count() by ActionType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
content.title: Override / Bypass events over time

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend Browser = case(
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "msedge", "Edge",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "chrome", "Chrome",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "firefox", "Firefox",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "opera", "Opera",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "brave", "Brave",
     "Other")
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(coalesce(P.Experience, P.ResponseCategory))
| summarize Overrides = count(),
            Devices  = dcount(DeviceName),
            Domains  = dcount(tostring(parse_url(RemoteUrl).Host)),
            Browsers = make_set(Browser, 10),
            Categories = make_set(Category, 10),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            SampleUrls = make_set(RemoteUrl, 5)
         by User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn
| where isnotempty(User)
| order by Overrides desc
content.title: Top users who overrode warnings (with browser & category)

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Category = tostring(coalesce(P.Experience, P.ResponseCategory))
| where isnotempty(Category)
| summarize Hits = count() by Category
| order by Hits desc
content.title: What categories users clicked through

content.query:
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ("SmartScreenUserOverride","NetworkProtectionUserBypassEvent")
| where "{DeviceName}" == "*" or DeviceName has "{DeviceName}"
| where "{UserUPN}" == "*" or InitiatingProcessAccountUpn has "{UserUPN}"
| where "{UrlContains}" == "" or RemoteUrl has "{UrlContains}"
| extend P = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend Browser = case(
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "msedge", "Edge",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "chrome", "Chrome",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "firefox", "Firefox",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "opera", "Opera",
     InitiatingProcessFileName has "brave", "Brave",
     "Other")
| extend Category   = tostring(coalesce(P.Experience, P.ResponseCategory)),
         Application = tostring(coalesce(P.ApplicationName, P.DisplayName)),
         Allow       = tostring(P.Allow),
         IsAudit     = tostring(P.IsAudit),
         UserSid     = tostring(P.UserSid)
| project TimeGenerated, User = InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, DeviceName, Browser, ActionType, Category, RemoteUrl, Application, Allow, IsAudit, UserSid, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Override / Bypass events
